title: chrysothamnus viscidiflorus subsp. planifolius
intro: Chrysothamnus viscidiflorus subsp. planifolius, also known as the silver sagebrush, is a shrubby plant native to North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off bacterial infections due to its high concentration of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Chrysothamnus viscidiflorus subsp. planifolius include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
